list.title: Apps
list.description: Create Apps and connect them to Apple App Store or Google Play.
list.deleteConfirm: Delete {{name}} and all of its Store Connections, Store Credentials, Reviews, Reply Drafts, Published Replies, and Sync Runs? This cannot be undone.

empty.title: No Apps connected yet
empty.description: Create your first App now. Store Connections can be added in the same flow.

sync.partial: Sync stopped after reaching a usage limit.
sync.failed: We could not sync Reviews yet.

errors.appleAuthFailed: The Apple Store Credential is invalid.
errors.appleForbidden: This Apple Store Credential cannot access Reviews for this App.
errors.appleNotFound: Apple cannot find this App for this Store Credential.
errors.appleRateLimited: Apple is temporarily rate limiting API calls. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.appleUnavailable: Apple App Store is unavailable right now.
errors.googleAuthFailed: The Google Play Store Credential is invalid.
errors.googleForbidden: This Google Play Store Credential cannot access Reviews for this App.
errors.googleNotFound: Google Play cannot find this App for this Store Credential.
errors.googleRateLimited: Google Play is temporarily rate limiting API calls. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.googleUnavailable: Google Play is unavailable right now.
errors.invalidCredentialFormat: The saved Apple Store Credential is invalid.
errors.invalidGoogleCredentialFormat: The saved Google Play Store Credential is invalid.
errors.missingCredential: This Store Connection has no Store Credential.
errors.missingExternalAppId: This Store Connection has no App Store app id.
errors.unsupportedStoreProvider: This Store Connection does not support this sync.

errors.queueFailed: We could not queue missing Reply Drafts yet.

errors.loadFailed: We could not load Apps yet.
errors.deleteFailed: We could not delete this App yet.

createApp.title: Create the App
createApp.description: Start with the product name. Store-specific details come next.

editApp.title: Edit the App
editApp.description: Update the visible name for this App. Store-specific details come next.

storeConnections.title: Add Store Connections
storeConnections.description: Connect Apple, Google, both, or skip this for now.

editStoreConnections.title: Edit Store Connections
editStoreConnections.description: Update public store identifiers. Leave credential fields empty to keep the existing Store Credential.

credentials.keepExistingPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the existing Store Credential

apple.skipHint: Leave every field empty to skip Apple for now.
apple.editHint: Update App Store identifiers. Fill key id and private key only to replace the Store Credential.

google.skipHint: Leave every field empty to skip Google for now.
google.editHint: Update the package name. Fill the service account JSON only to replace the Store Credential.

errors.appleAppIdRequiredForVerification: Enter the App Store app id before verifying the Apple Store Credential.
errors.appleAuthFailed: The Apple Store Credential is invalid. Check the issuer id, key id, and private key.
errors.appleCredentialInvalidFormat: The Apple Store Credential must contain issuerId, keyId, and privateKey.
errors.appleCredentialReplacementIncomplete: To replace the Apple Store Credential, enter both the key id and private key.
errors.appleCredentialRequiredForVerification: Add an Apple Store Credential before verifying this Store Connection.
errors.appleForbidden: This Apple Store Credential cannot access Reviews for this App.
errors.appleIssuerChangeRequiresCredentialRepla: Changing the Apple issuer id requires replacing the Store Credential.
errors.appleNotFound: Apple cannot find this App for this Store Credential. Check the App Store app id.
errors.appleRateLimited: Apple is temporarily rate limiting API calls. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.appleUnavailable: We could not verify the Apple Store Credential yet. Try again later.
errors.partialStoreConnection: Complete every field for a Store Connection, or leave all of its fields empty.
errors.googleAuthFailed: The Google Play Store Credential is invalid. Check the service account JSON.
errors.googleCredentialInvalidFormat: The Google Play Store Credential must contain client_email and private_key.
errors.googleCredentialInvalidJson: The Google Play Store Credential must be valid JSON.
errors.googleCredentialRequiredForVerification: Add a Google Play Store Credential before verifying this Store Connection.
errors.googleCredentialNotObject: The Google Play Store Credential must be a JSON object.
errors.googleForbidden: This Google Play Store Credential cannot access Reviews for this App.
errors.googleNotFound: Google Play cannot find this App for this Store Credential. Check the package name.
errors.googlePackageNameRequiredForVerification: Enter the package name before verifying the Google Play Store Credential.
errors.googleRateLimited: Google Play is temporarily rate limiting API calls. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.googleUnavailable: We could not verify the Google Play Store Credential yet. Try again later.
errors.createFailed: We could not create this App yet.
errors.updateFailed: We could not update this App yet.

replyInbox.title: Reply Inbox
replyInbox.description: Review, edit, ignore, and publish replies for imported Reviews.

dialog.manualDescription: Write the reply text, then save it as a Reply Draft or publish it immediately.
dialog.editDescription: Adjust the saved Reply Draft, then save it or publish the edited version.
dialog.help: Keep the tone helpful and specific. The reply must contain text before it can be saved or published.

messages.draftQueued: Reply Draft generation queued. It will be available soon.
messages.actionFailed: We could not complete this action yet.

empty.title: No Reviews in this view
empty.description: Change the App or status filter, or sync Reviews from the Apps page.

auditHistory.title: Audit History
auditHistory.description: Track draft creation, edits, ignores, failures, and publishing across this Organization.

empty.title: No audit events yet
empty.description: Change the App or action filter, or come back after Reply Inbox activity.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.alreadyMember: This user is already a member of this Organization.
errors.cancelFailed: We could not cancel this invitation yet.
errors.copyFailed: We could not copy this invitation link.
errors.inviteFailed: We could not send this invitation yet.

profile.logoHint: Use a PNG, JPEG, or WebP image up to 5MB.

identity.title: Organization identity
identity.description: Update the visible name and logo used across ReviewInbox.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.description: Delete this Organization and everything it owns.
danger.selfHostedUnavailable: Organization deletion is not available in self-hosted deployments.
danger.ownerOnly: Only an Organization Owner can delete this Organization.
danger.consequences: This permanently deletes Apps, Store Connections, encrypted Store Credentials, Reviews, and Sync Runs.

errors.deleteFailed: We could not delete this Organization yet.
errors.loadFailed: We could not load this Organization profile.
errors.logoFailed: We could not upload this logo yet.
errors.logoType: Logo must be a PNG, JPEG, or WebP image.
errors.saveFailed: We could not save this Organization profile yet.

new.title: Create an Organization
new.description: Organization creation will live here. For now, this placeholder keeps the cloud deletion flow in a safe landing state.
